Locations.name: Rotting Marshlands
Locations.description: You wake with a pounding headache on cold, muddy ground. Gray-green fog rolls between twisted trees. The air reeks of decay and rot. This cursed swamp is no place for the living.

Locations.name: Forsaken Town
Locations.description: An old, dilapidated town where disturbing shadows move through empty streets. Crumbling houses stand as monuments to a forgotten past.

Locations.name: Town Hall Tower
Locations.description: A crumbling tower in the center of the Forsaken Town. Dark magic concentrates here, making the air thick and difficult to breathe.

Locations.name: Sunny Glade
Locations.description: A safe, sun-drenched refuge that offers rest and regeneration. The warmth here feels like a blessing after the cursed lands.

Locations.name: Windmill
Locations.description: An abandoned windmill that spins endlessly without wind, powered by a mechanical device of unknown origin.

Locations.name: Whispering Woods
Locations.description: A dense forest where trees speak and try to confuse travelers. Their whispers promise truth but deliver only lies.

Locations.name: Ancient Oak of Wisdom
Locations.description: A majestic tree that guards the knowledge of the forest and protects the path to further locations.

Locations.name: Frozen Peaks
Locations.description: Snow-covered and inhospitable mountain peaks with freezing climate and thin air. Every breath is a struggle.

Locations.name: Caverns of Oblivion
Locations.description: A dark underground complex where movement near chasms is impossible without magical light. One wrong step means certain death.

Locations.name: Druid's Star Circle
Locations.description: An ancient ritual site formed by a circle of stones atop a mountain. The altar at its center pulses with dormant power.

Items.name: Magic Wand
Items.description: A wand that allows you to use magic in combat. It hums with arcane power.

Items.name: Rusty Key
Items.description: An old rusty key meant to unlock the mechanism in the Windmill.

Items.name: Light Crystal
Items.description: An essential tool for illuminating dark spaces. It glows with pure white light.

Items.name: Swamp Gas
Items.description: A rare gas from the marshlands. One of the ritual artifacts needed for the altar.

Items.name: Magic Flour
Items.description: Enchanted flour from the Windmill. One of the ritual artifacts needed for the altar.

Items.name: Eternal Twig
Items.description: A twig from the Ancient Oak that never withers. One of the ritual artifacts needed for the altar.

Items.name: Frosty Quartz
Items.description: A crystalline mineral from the frozen peaks. One of the ritual artifacts needed for the altar.

Items.name: Rune Stone
Items.description: An ancient stone carved with mystical runes. One of the ritual artifacts needed for the altar.

Items.name: Spell Fragment
Items.description: A fragment of a powerful spell. The final ritual artifact needed for the altar.

Items.name: Healing Elixir
Items.description: A potion that can heal joint pains and other ailments.

Items.name: Glasses
Items.description: A pair of spectacles lost in the marshlands.

Characters.name: Swamp Wanderer
Characters.description: A creature inhabiting the marshlands. It squints as it tries to see you.
Characters.dialogue:
I... I can't see properly. My glasses! I lost my glasses somewhere in this cursed swamp.
If you find them and bring them to me, I'll give you something valuable - a rare swamp gas.
Use command 'use glasses'
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: You found them! I can see again! Here, take this swamp gas as promised. It's a ritual artifact - guard it well.

Characters.name: Skeleton Hugo
Characters.description: The former mayor, now a skeleton suffering from joint pains.
Characters.dialogue:
Ahhh, my bones ache terribly! Once I was the proud mayor of this town.
Now I'm just a pile of bones in constant pain. Bring me a healing elixir, and I'll give you my precious key.
Use command 'Use healing_elixir'
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: Ahh! The pain is gone! Thank you, traveler. Here's the rusty key I promised. May it serve you well.

Characters.name: Forest Fairy
Characters.description: Guardian of the crystal who tests travelers with riddles.
Characters.dialogue:
Welcome, traveler. I am the guardian of the Light Crystal.
To prove your wit, answer my riddle:

I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but come alive with wind. What am I?
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: Correct! An echo. You have proven your intellect. Take the Light Crystal - you'll need it in the darkness below.

Characters.name: Explorer Gerald
Characters.description: A mineral expert trapped in the caverns.
Characters.dialogue:
Ah, another soul braving these caverns!
I'm a mineral expert, and I have a Rune Stone you seek.
But first, solve my riddle:

The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: Footsteps! Well done. Here's the Rune Stone. Use it wisely.

Characters.name: Oak of Wisdom
Characters.description: An intelligent tree that requires proof of magical abilities.
Characters.dialogue:
Young wizard... I sense you, but words alone mean nothing.
Show me you possess true magical power. Use your wand in my presence, and I shall grant you the Eternal Twig.
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: Your magic is genuine. Take this Eternal Twig - a piece of my essence that shall never wither.

Characters.name: Arcanist Malrec
Characters.description: A former court wizard who became enslaved after attempting to gain power.
Characters.dialogue:
You dare enter my domain? I was once the greatest court wizard, but my quest for power transformed me into...this. 
Now I serve the curse itself. If you want the Spell Fragment, you must defeat me in combat!
Use command 'use magic_wand'
Characters.questCompleteDialogue: You... you've freed me. The curse's hold is broken. Take the Spell Fragment. Use it to end this nightmare for everyone.

Quests.name: Find the Glasses
Quests.description: Find the Swamp Wanderer's lost glasses.

Quests.name: Heal Skeleton Hugo
Quests.description: Bring a healing elixir to Skeleton Hugo.

Quests.name: Solve the Fairy's Riddle
Quests.description: Answer the Forest Fairy's riddle correctly.

Quests.name: Prove Your Magic
Quests.description: Demonstrate your magical abilities to the Oak of Wisdom.

Quests.name: Defeat Arcanist Malrec
Quests.description: Defeat the corrupted wizard in combat.
